# Personal Finance

Personal finance agent for budget tracking, expense analysis, savings goals, and financial planning.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs budget creation, expense categorization, savings goal tracking, debt payoff strategies, and financial health assessments. Not a licensed advisor.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `shell_exec`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run personal-finance
```
